rule_metadata.name: ft_cab
rule_metadata.author: Jason Batchelor
rule_metadata.desc: File magic for CABs (Microsoft Cabinet Files)

rules.rule_text:
rule ft_cab
{
	meta:
		author = "Jason Batchelor"
		company = "Emerson"
		lastmod = "20150723"
		desc = "File magic for CABs (Microsoft Cabinet Files)"

	strings:
		$cab = { 4D 53 43 46 }

	condition:
		$cab at 0
}
